name: io.github.edithatogo/dnz
title: DigitalNZ
description: Search DigitalNZ records and facets through a local MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: DIGITALNZ_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: DigitalNZ API key used by search and facet tools.

environmentVariables.name: DNZ_CACHE_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Optional SQLite cache path for repeated DigitalNZ API calls.

environmentVariables.name: DNZ_LOG
environmentVariables.description: Optional log level for MCP server diagnostics.
